chunks.title: God's Instructions for Jericho
chunks.reason: Describes the initial divine command and specific tactical instructions given to Joshua.

chunks.title: The Six Days of Marching
chunks.reason: Narrates the execution of the first six days where the army marched around the city once daily.

chunks.title: The Seventh Day and Conquest
chunks.reason: Covers the climax of the event with seven marches, the shout, the wall falling, and the city's destruction.

chunks.title: Rahab and Her Family Saved
chunks.reason: Details the specific rescue of Rahab's household and the burning of the city.

chunks.title: The Curse on Jericho
chunks.reason: Records Joshua's oath regarding the future rebuilding of the city and concludes with Yahweh's presence.
